languages.text: "Уж лучше потерпеть. Вон, двое без очереди зашли, а их потом вперед ногами обратно вынесли..."
"It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."
languages.original_text: "Уж лучше потерпеть. Вон, двое без очереди зашли, а их потом вперед ногами обратно вынесли..."

traits.locale_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."
"It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."
"It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

languages.text: 「ただ、忍耐するだけがいいですよ。ほら、2人、列を無視して入ってきたけど、後で運ばれて出されたんだ…」
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

languages.text: "Sabırlı olmalıyız. Bak, iki kişi sıra beklemeden daldı. Sonra dışarı taşındılar..."
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

traits.locale_text: "Sabırlı olmalıyız. Bak, iki kişi sıra beklemeden daldı. Sonra dışarı taşındılar..."

languages.text: “还是耐心些为好。你看，刚才两个不排队硬闯的人，后来可是被抬出来的……”
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

traits.locale_text: “还是耐心些为好。你看，刚才两个不排队硬闯的人，后来可是被抬出来的……”

languages.text: "Es ist besser, geduldig zu bleiben. Vorhin haben sich zwei Typen vorgedrängelt und später wurden sie wieder rausgetragen ..."
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist besser, geduldig zu bleiben. Vorhin haben sich zwei Typen vorgedrängelt und später wurden sie wieder rausgetragen ..."

languages.text: « Il vaut mieux faire preuve de patience. Tout à l'heure, deux personnes ont débarqué sans faire la queue, et elles sont ressorties plus tard sur des brancards… »
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

traits.locale_text: « Il vaut mieux faire preuve de patience. Tout à l'heure, deux personnes ont débarqué sans faire la queue, et elles sont ressorties plus tard sur des brancards… »

languages.text: «Es mejor tener paciencia. Mira, dos personas irrumpieron saltándose la cola y se los tuvieron que llevar en volandas...».
languages.original_text: "It's better just to be patient. Look, two people barged in without queuing, and later they were carried back out..."

traits.locale_text: «Es mejor tener paciencia. Mira, dos personas irrumpieron saltándose la cola y se los tuvieron que llevar en volandas...».
